y_{i}^{\text{router}}=\begin{cases}0,&r_{i}<\tau\;\text{(compression has negligible impact)}\\
1,&r_{i}\geq\tau\;\text{(compression has significant impact)},\end{cases}

items.en: where yirouter=0y_{i}^{\text{router}}=0 and yirouter=1y_{i}^{\text{router}}=1 indicate that the compression rate ξ\xi is set to 116\tfrac{1}{16} and 14\tfrac{1}{4}, respectively. During training, we store the historical rir_{i} values of a sliding window, and τ\tau is a dynamical threshold computed from the k-th percentile of historical rir_{i} values. In practice, the target distribution is balanced. During the consistency training stage, all patches of the same image are represented with a random compression rate, in order to ensure that the model retains its capability when no compression is applied. As shown in Section 3.15, InternVL3.5-Flash reduces 50% of the visual tokens while maintaining nearly 100% of the original performance.
items.zh: 其中yi^router=0和yi^router=1分别表示压缩率ξ设置为1/16和1/4。在训练期间，我们存储滑动窗口的历史ri值，τ是从历史ri值的第k百分位数计算的动态阈值。在实践中，目标分布是平衡的。在一致性训练阶段，同一图像的所有块以随机压缩率表示，以确保模型在未应用压缩时保持其能力。如第3.15节所示，InternVL3.5-Flash减少了50%的视觉token，同时保持了几乎100%的原始性能。

items.en: Data. For the supervised fine-tuning (SFT) stage, the datasets comprise approximately 56 million samples, which corresponds to around 130 billion tokens. The proportion of text-only data to multimodal data is roughly 1:3.5. For the cascade reinforcement learning stage, we use MMPR-v1.2 [142] as the training data for offline RL, which contains about 200K sample pairs. Based on MMPR-v1.2, we compute the accuracy of each query using the provided rollouts and select those whose model accuracy falls between 0.2 and 0.8 for online RL. We further extend the dataset with recent multimodal datasets [90, 163, 135, 70, 83] to enhance diversity. The resulting dataset, termed MMPR-Tiny, consists of approximately 70K queries. We directly reuse the rollouts from MMPR-v1.2 for both offline RL and data filtering in online RL, thereby reducing the cost of sampling additional rollouts.
items.zh: 数据。对于监督微调（SFT）阶段，数据集包含约5600万个样本，对应约1300亿个token。纯文本数据与多模态数据的比例约为1:3.5。对于级联强化学习阶段，我们使用MMPR-v1.2[142]作为离线强化学习的训练数据，其中包含约20万个样本对。基于MMPR-v1.2，我们使用提供的展开计算每个查询的准确率，并选择模型准确率在0.2到0.8之间的查询用于在线强化学习。我们进一步使用最近的多模态数据集[90, 163, 135, 70, 83]扩展数据集以增强多样性。得到的数据集称为MMPR-Tiny，包含约7万个查询。我们直接重用MMPR-v1.2中的展开用于离线强化学习和在线强化学习中的数据过滤，从而减少采样额外展开的成本。

items.en: For the ViCO stage, we primarily leverage datasets identical to the SFT stage during consistency training, ensuring that the model retains its original performance. During router training, we use a subset of the SFT data, primarily composed of OCR and VQA examples, which are rich in visual information and sometimes require high-resolution understanding. This enables the resolution router to learn how to dynamically decide whether each image patch can be compressed based on the visual information.
items.zh: 对于ViCO阶段，我们在一致性训练期间主要使用与SFT阶段相同的数据集，以确保模型保持其原始性能。在路由器训练期间，我们使用SFT数据的一个子集，主要由OCR和VQA示例组成，这些示例富含视觉信息，有时需要高分辨率理解。这使得分辨率路由器能够学习如何根据视觉信息动态决定每个图像块是否可以压缩。

items.en: Test-time scaling (TTS) has been empirically demonstrated as an effective approach to enhance the reasoning capabilities of LLMs and MLLMs, particularly for complex tasks that require multi-step inference [143, 113, 179, 82, 65]. In this work, we implement a comprehensive test-time scaling approach that simultaneously improves reasoning depth (i.e., deep thinking) and breadth (i.e., parallel thinking). We note that unless otherwise specified, the experimental results reported in Section 3 are obtained without applying TTS. Thus far, we have only applied TTS to reasoning benchmarks, since we found that the model already exhibits strong perception and understanding capabilities, and initiating TTS yields no significant improvement.
items.zh: 测试时扩展（TTS）已被经验证明是增强大语言模型和多模态大语言模型推理能力的有效方法，特别是对于需要多步推理的复杂任务[143, 113, 179, 82, 65]。在这项工作中，我们实现了一种全面的测试时扩展方法，同时提高了推理深度（即深度思考）和广度（即并行思考）。我们注意到，除非另有说明，第3节中报告的实验结果是在未应用TTS的情况下获得的。到目前为止，我们仅将TTS应用于推理基准测试，因为我们发现模型已经表现出强大的感知和理解能力，启动TTS不会带来显著改进。

items.en: Deep Thinking. By activating the Thinking mode, we guide the model to deliberately engage in step-by-step reasoning (i.e., decomposing complex problems into logical steps and validating intermediate conclusions) prior to generating the final answer. This approach systematically improves the logical structure of solutions for complex problems, particularly those requiring multi-step inference, and enhances reasoning depth.
items.zh: 深度思考。通过激活思考模式，我们引导模型在生成最终答案之前有意识地进行逐步推理（即将复杂问题分解为逻辑步骤并验证中间结论）。这种方法系统地改进了复杂问题（特别是需要多步推理的问题）解决方案的逻辑结构，并增强了推理深度。

items.en: Parallel Thinking. Following InternVL3, for reasoning tasks, we adopt the Best-of-N (BoN) strategy by employing VisualPRM-v1.1 [143] as the critic model to select the optimal response from multiple reasoning candidates. This approach improves the reasoning breadth.
items.zh: 并行思考。遵循InternVL3，对于推理任务，我们采用Best-of-N（BoN）策略，使用VisualPRM-v1.1[143]作为评判模型，从多个推理候选中选择最佳响应。这种方法提高了推理广度。

items.en: Training Framework. The model training is conducted mainly based on the XTuner framework [21], which incorporates a series of optimization strategies tailored for LLM and MoE training. These include fully shared data parallelism (FSDP) [182] to partition model parameters across GPUs, data packing [13] to reduce padding tokens while balancing the token computation load across ranks for improved training efficiency, FP8 training based on DeepGEMM [68] and liger-kernel’s fused cross-entropy operator [47] to accelerate the training process, FlashAttention-3 [27, 26] to support packed inputs and speed up attention computation, and the TMA-Adaptive FP8 Grouped GEMM kernel [118] to optimize the training of MoE models. For the online stage, we use verl [111] as our codebase. For InternVL3.5-20B-A4B, we implement an accelerated version of window attention with sink in GPT-OSS-20B through Triton [130].
items.zh: 训练框架。模型训练主要基于XTuner框架[21]进行，该框架集成了一系列针对LLM和MoE训练的优化策略。这些策略包括：全共享数据并行（FSDP）[182]以在GPU间划分模型参数；数据打包[13]以减少填充token，同时平衡各rank的token计算负载以提高训练效率；基于DeepGEMM [68]和liger-kernel的融合交叉熵算子[47]的FP8训练以加速训练过程；FlashAttention-3 [27, 26]以支持打包输入并加速注意力计算；以及TMA-Adaptive FP8 Grouped GEMM内核[118]以优化MoE模型的训练。对于在线阶段，我们使用verl [111]作为代码库。对于InternVL3.5-20B-A4B，我们通过Triton [130]在GPT-OSS-20B中实现了带有sink的窗口注意力的加速版本。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Overview of Decoupled Vision-Language Deployment. DvD decouples the vision and language models and deploys them on separate servers. The right side shows a time-consumption trace of the pipeline. (a) In the original deployment, the ViT, MLP, and LLM are executed sequentially. Given their substantial differences in size and computation patterns, this serial design significantly slows down inference. (b) With DvD, the inference of the ViT and the LLM is performed in parallel and asynchronously. Thus, ViT’s computations can overlap with the LLM’s prefilling and decoding, reducing resource conflicts and improving inference speed.
items.capZh: 图4：解耦视觉-语言部署概述。DvD将视觉模型和语言模型解耦，并部署在独立的服务器上。右侧显示了流水线的时间消耗追踪。(a) 在原始部署中，ViT、MLP和LLM顺序执行。鉴于它们在规模和计算模式上的显著差异，这种串行设计显著降低了推理速度。(b) 使用DvD后，ViT和LLM的推理并行且异步执行。因此，ViT的计算可以与LLM的预填充和解码重叠，减少资源冲突并提高推理速度。

items.en: Decoupled Vision-Language Deployment. In multimodal inference, the vision encoder and language model have distinct computational characteristics. The vision encoder that transforms images into semantic features is highly parallelizable and does not rely on long-term history state. In contrast, the language model adopts the inference in an autoregressive manner, which requires previous states to compute the next one. This sequential property makes the language part more sensitive to memory bandwidth and latency. When MLLMs are deployed online at scale, the vision and language models often block each other, thus incurring additional inference cost. This effect becomes more pronounced with larger vision models or higher-resolution images.
items.zh: 解耦视觉-语言部署。在多模态推理中，视觉编码器和语言模型具有不同的计算特性。将图像转换为语义特征的视觉编码器高度可并行化，且不依赖长期历史状态。相比之下，语言模型采用自回归方式进行推理，需要先前状态来计算下一个状态。这种顺序特性使得语言部分对内存带宽和延迟更为敏感。当MLLM大规模在线部署时，视觉模型和语言模型常常相互阻塞，从而产生额外的推理成本。随着视觉模型更大或图像分辨率更高，这种效应变得更加明显。

items.en: As shown in Figure 4, we propose Decoupled Vision-Language Deployment (DvD) to address this issue by separating vision and language processing, with a particular focus on optimizing the prefilling stage. The vision subsystem batches and processes images to produce compact feature embeddings, which are then transmitted to the language subsystem for fusion with the text context prior to decoding. This separation alleviates blocking and brings multimodal prefilling performance closer to that of pure language models. In our system implementation, the ViT and MLP (and ViR for InternVL3.5-Flash) are deployed on the vision server, while the language server executes only the LLM. The communication is unidirectional, transmitting BF16 visual features over TCP, with RDMA optionally employed to achieve a higher transmission speed. Vision processing, feature transmission, and language processing are organized into an asynchronous three-stage pipeline, enabling overlapped execution and minimizing pipeline stalls.
items.zh: 如图4所示，我们提出解耦视觉-语言部署（DvD）来解决这一问题，通过分离视觉和语言处理，特别关注优化预填充阶段。视觉子系统批处理并处理图像以生成紧凑的特征嵌入，然后传输到语言子系统，在解码前与文本上下文融合。这种分离减轻了阻塞，使多模态预填充性能更接近纯语言模型。在我们的系统实现中，ViT和MLP（以及InternVL3.5-Flash的ViR）部署在视觉服务器上，而语言服务器仅执行LLM。通信是单向的，通过TCP传输BF16视觉特征，可选地使用RDMA以实现更高的传输速度。视觉处理、特征传输和语言处理被组织成异步三级流水线，实现重叠执行并最小化流水线停顿。

items.en: DvD increases GPU utilization and processing efficiency on the vision side, while enabling the language server to focus exclusively on the LLM’s prefilling and decoding without being blocked by vision computation. This design leads to improved throughput and responsiveness. Moreover, the architecture supports independent hardware cost optimization for the vision and language modules, and facilitates the seamless integration of new modules without requiring modifications to the language server deployment.
items.zh: DvD提高了视觉侧的GPU利用率和处理效率，同时使语言服务器能够专注于LLM的预填充和解码，而不会被视觉计算阻塞。这种设计提高了吞吐量和响应性。此外，该架构支持视觉和语言模块的独立硬件成本优化，并便于无缝集成新模块，而无需修改语言服务器部署。

items.en: Here, we first compare the overall performance of InternVL3.5 with recent leading multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in Section 3.1. Subsequently, we evaluate our models in various domains, including multimodal reasoning and mathematics (Section 3.2), optical character recognition (OCR), chart and document understanding (Section 3.3), multi-image understanding (Section 3.4), real-world comprehension (Section 3.5), comprehensive multimodal evaluation (Section 3.6), multimodal hallucination evaluation (Section 3.7), visual grounding (Section 3.8), multimodal multilingual understanding (Section 3.9), video understanding (Section 3.10), GUI (Section 3.11), embodied (Section 3.12), and SVG (Section 3.13) tasks, most of which were tested using VLMEvalKit [31]. Additionally, the evaluation of the language capabilities of InternVL3.5 is presented in Section 3.14. Finally, we ablate newly proposed designs in InternVL3.5, including the Cascade Reinforcement Learning, Visual Resolution Router, and Decoupled Vision-Language Deployment (Section 3.15).
items.zh: 在此，我们首先在第3.1节中将InternVL3.5的整体性能与近期领先的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）进行比较。随后，我们在多个领域评估我们的模型，包括多模态推理与数学（第3.2节）、光学字符识别（OCR）、图表与文档理解（第3.3节）、多图像理解（第3.4节）、真实世界理解（第3.5节）、综合多模态评估（第3.6节）、多模态幻觉评估（第3.7节）、视觉定位（第3.8节）、多模态多语言理解（第3.9节）、视频理解（第3.10节）、GUI（第3.11节）、具身（第3.12节）和SVG（第3.13节）任务，其中大部分使用VLMEvalKit [31]进行测试。此外，InternVL3.5的语言能力评估在第3.14节中呈现。最后，我们对InternVL3.5中新提出的设计进行消融研究，包括级联强化学习、视觉分辨率路由器和解耦视觉-语言部署（第3.15节）。

full.sec: 3.1 Overall Comparison with Other Advanced MLLMs
full.secZh: 3.1 与其他先进多模态大语言模型的整体比较

items.en: We report results of our flagship models (InternVL3.5-30B-A3B and InternVL3.5-241B-A28B) and frontier open-source MLLMs (GLM-4.1V [46], Kimi-VL-A3B-2506 [125], GLM-4.5V [46], Qwen2.5-VL-72B [5] and Step-3 [129]). We also include a state-of-the-art closed-source MLLM (GPT-5 [98]) for comparison.
items.zh: 我们报告了旗舰模型（InternVL3.5-30B-A3B和InternVL3.5-241B-A28B）以及前沿开源MLLM（GLM-4.1V [46]、Kimi-VL-A3B-2506 [125]、GLM-4.5V [46]、Qwen2.5-VL-72B [5]和Step-3 [129]）的结果。我们还包含了一个最先进的闭源MLLM（GPT-5 [98]）进行比较。

items.en: These results highlight InternVL3.5’s strong capabilities across diverse tasks. For general multimodal tasks, InternVL3.5 demonstrates leading performance among open-source models on general multimodal understanding (e.g., MMVet), multilingual (e.g., MTVQA), OCR (e.g., OCRBench), real-world (e.g., MME-RealWorld), and video (e.g., LongVideoBench) benchmarks. It even achieves a similar overall score as GPT-5 [98] (74.1 vs. 74.0), the state-of-the-art closed-source MLLM. Nevertheless, some tasks like HallusionBench still pose challenges, indicating the need for further refinements.
items.zh: 这些结果突显了InternVL3.5在多样化任务中的强大能力。对于通用多模态任务，InternVL3.5在通用多模态理解（如MMVet）、多语言（如MTVQA）、OCR（如OCRBench）、真实世界（如MME-RealWorld）和视频（如LongVideoBench）基准测试中，在开源模型中表现出领先性能。它甚至达到了与最先进的闭源MLLM GPT-5 [98]相似的总分（74.1 vs. 74.0）。然而，一些任务如HallusionBench仍然构成挑战，表明需要进一步改进。

items.en: We also observe particularly significant gains in complex multimodal reasoning, as evidenced by the scores of 77.7 on MMMU and 82.7 on MathVista, which surpass most open-source models and approaching top-tier commercial systems. These improvements are largely driven by enhanced training strategies, especially Cascade RL, and refined test-time scaling methodologies, enabling robust generalization in challenging domains such as mathematical reasoning (e.g., MathVerse) and multidisciplinary understanding (e.g., MTVQA).
items.zh: 我们还观察到在复杂多模态推理方面特别显著的提升，MMMU得分77.7和MathVista得分82.7证明了这一点，超过了大多数开源模型，并接近顶级商业系统。这些改进主要得益于增强的训练策略，特别是级联RL，以及精细化的测试时缩放方法，使其在数学推理（如MathVerse）和多学科理解（如MTVQA）等挑战性领域实现了稳健的泛化。

items.en: For text-related tasks, InternVL3.5 outperforms most open-source models with significant margins. This is primarily due to our native pre-training strategy introduced in InternVL3 [187], where we include a large amount of text-only data in the training process. This strategy allows the model to simultaneously acquire linguistic and multimodal abilities in a more efficient and integrated manner, and preserve the language capabilities of the pre-trained LLM to avoid the catastrophic forgetting issue [80]. As a result, InternVL3.5 achieves high performance on both general (e.g., IFEval) and reasoning (e.g., AIME24 and MMLU-Pro) benchmarks and narrows the gap with GPT-5.
items.zh: 对于文本相关任务，InternVL3.5以显著优势超越了大多数开源模型。这主要归功于我们在InternVL3 [187]中引入的原生预训练策略，即在训练过程中包含大量纯文本数据。该策略使模型能够以更高效和集成的方式同时获得语言和多模态能力，并保留预训练LLM的语言能力，以避免灾难性遗忘问题[80]。因此，InternVL3.5在通用（如IFEval）和推理（如AIME24和MMLU-Pro）基准测试中均取得了高性能，并缩小了与GPT-5的差距。

items.en: We also demonstrate the versatility of InternVL3.5 through agentic benchmarks. On SGP-Bench, an SVG understanding benchmark, InternVL3.5 achieves leading performance (69.4 and 70.7) that surpasses all open-source models. For GUI tasks, our models show strong abilities on GUI grounding (ScreenSpot) and online agentic (OSWorld-G) benchmarks. Evaluation on embodied tasks (VSI-Bench, ERQA, SpaCE-10, OmniSpatial) validates InternVL3.5’s spatial reasoning skills and the competence to understand complex and dynamic environments, highlighting its potential in embodied agents, robotic navigation, and interactive scene perception.
items.zh: 我们还通过智能体式基准测试展示了InternVL3.5的多功能性。在SVG理解基准SGP-Bench上，InternVL3.5取得了领先性能（69.4和70.7），超越了所有开源模型。对于GUI任务，我们的模型在GUI定位（ScreenSpot）和在线智能体式（OSWorld-G）基准测试中表现出强大能力。在具身任务（VSI-Bench、ERQA、SpaCE-10、OmniSpatial）上的评估验证了InternVL3.5的空间推理技能以及理解复杂动态环境的能力，突显了其在具身智能体、机器人导航和交互式场景感知中的潜力。

items.en: To comprehensively evaluate the multimodal reasoning and mathematical capabilities of InternVL3.5, we conduct extensive experiments across a series of benchmarks, including MMMU [170] for multidisciplinary reasoning, MathVista [76], MathVision [134], and MathVerse [175] for mathematical reasoning, as well as DynaMath [189], WeMath [100], and LogicVista [153] for complementary logical reasoning assessment.
items.zh: 为了全面评估InternVL3.5的多模态推理和数学能力，我们在一系列基准测试上进行了广泛实验，包括用于多学科推理的MMMU [170]，用于数学推理的MathVista [76]、MathVision [134]和MathVerse [175]，以及用于补充逻辑推理评估的DynaMath [189]、WeMath [100]和LogicVista [153]。

items.en: As shown in Table 3, InternVL3.5 achieves state-of-the-art performance across all evaluated benchmarks among open-source models. Compared with the previous generation InternVL3, InternVL3.5 improves reasoning performance by more than 10 points across all model sizes relative to their counterparts of the comparable scale. Furthermore, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B consistently outperforms all open-source counterparts, obtaining an overall average score of 66.9. It is followed by InternVL3.5-38B, which secures the second highest score with an average of 66.0. At mid-scale, the performance of InternVL3.5 is particularly impressive, with InternVL3.5-30B-A3B and InternVL3.5-14B attaining scores of 75.6 and 73.3 on MMMU respectively, both outperforming the larger InternVL3-78B (72.2). At lightweight scales, InternVL3.5 achieves substantial gains over open-source baselines. Compared to its predecessor InternVL3, it delivers marked improvements: the InternVL3.5-2B model has an average score of 50.7, significantly higher than that of InternVL3-2B with a score of 32.4; the InternVL3.5-4B model, with a score of 57.4, far exceeds the score of 33.5 of MiniCPM-V-4; and the InternVL3.5-8B model achieves a score of 60.3, substantially surpassing the score of 44.3 of InternVL3-8B. These significant improvements are mainly from our Cascade RL, showing its strong scalability for reasoning tasks. The ablation study about how different training stages influence the reasoning abilities of our models is presented in Section 3.15.
items.zh: 如表3所示，InternVL3.5在所有评估基准上均取得了开源模型中的最先进性能。与上一代InternVL3相比，InternVL3.5在所有模型规模上，相对于同等规模对应模型，推理性能提升了超过10个百分点。此外，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B持续优于所有开源对应模型，获得了66.9的总体平均分。紧随其后的是InternVL3.5-38B，以平均分66.0获得第二高分。在中规模上，InternVL3.5的性能尤为突出，InternVL3.5-30B-A3B和InternVL3.5-14B在MMMU上分别达到75.6和73.3，均优于更大的InternVL3-78B（72.2）。在轻量级规模上，InternVL3.5相对于开源基线取得了显著提升。与其前身InternVL3相比，它带来了显著改进：InternVL3.5-2B模型平均分50.7，显著高于InternVL3-2B的32.4；InternVL3.5-4B模型得分57.4，远超MiniCPM-V-4的33.5；InternVL3.5-8B模型得分60.3，大幅超过InternVL3-8B的44.3。这些显著改进主要来自我们的级联RL，显示了其在推理任务上的强大可扩展性。关于不同训练阶段如何影响模型推理能力的消融研究在第3.15节中呈现。

items.en: Furthermore, our experiments also demonstrate that Cascade RL can be seamlessly combined with parallel thinking and obtain further gains. For instance, with parallel thinking, the overall reasoning scores of InternVL3.5-4B, InternVL3.5-8B and InternVL3.5-241B-A28B are further improved by +2.6%, +2.1% and +1.8%, respectively, highlighting the effectiveness of test-time scaling for reasoning-related tasks.
items.zh: 此外，我们的实验还表明，级联RL可以与并行思维无缝结合，并获得进一步收益。例如，使用并行思维后，InternVL3.5-4B、InternVL3.5-8B和InternVL3.5-241B-A28B的总体推理得分分别进一步提高了+2.6%、+2.1%和+1.8%，突显了测试时缩放对推理相关任务的有效性。

items.en: To evaluate the comprehensive capabilities of the model across tasks related to text, document, and chart comprehension, we conduct an extensive assessment on nine benchmarks: AI2D [55], ChartQA [87], TextVQA [112], DocVQA [89], InfoVQA [88], OCRBench [72], SEED-2-Plus [59], CharXiv [148], and VCR [176].
items.zh: 为了评估模型在文本、文档和图表理解相关任务上的综合能力，我们在九个基准测试上进行了广泛评估：AI2D [55]、ChartQA [87]、TextVQA [112]、DocVQA [89]、InfoVQA [88]、OCRBench [72]、SEED-2-Plus [59]、CharXiv [148]和VCR [176]。

items.en: As shown in Table 4, InternVL3.5 achieves competitive results on these benchmarks, outperforming other open-source and closed-source models. At the lightweight scale, InternVL3.5 demonstrates significant potential. For instance, InternVL3.5-2B attains an overall average score of 76.7 across nine benchmarks, surpassing InternVL3-2B of similar size, which scores 74.7. Specifically, on DocVQA, InfoVQA, and SEED-2-Plus, InternVL3.5-2B achieves scores of 89.4, 70.8, and 68.0, respectively, compared to 88.3, 66.1, and 64.6 for InternVL3-2B, highlighting InternVL3.5’s strong vision-language understanding capabilities.
items.zh: 如表4所示，InternVL3.5在这些基准测试上取得了有竞争力的结果，优于其他开源和闭源模型。在轻量级规模上，InternVL3.5展现出显著潜力。例如，InternVL3.5-2B在九个基准测试上的总体平均分达到76.7，超过了类似大小的InternVL3-2B（74.7）。具体而言，在DocVQA、InfoVQA和SEED-2-Plus上，InternVL3.5-2B分别达到89.4、70.8和68.0，而InternVL3-2B为88.3、66.1和64.6，突显了InternVL3.5强大的视觉-语言理解能力。

items.en: Moreover, as the model scale increases, InternVL3.5 continues to deliver enhanced performance in vision-language understanding. Across the same nine benchmarks, InternVL3.5-4B, InternVL3.5-20B-A4B, InternVL3.5-14B, InternVL3.5-30B-A3B, and InternVL3.5-38B achieve overall average scores of 80.0, 81.7, 82.0, 83.9, and 84.6, respectively, demonstrating consistent improvements with larger model sizes. On AI2D, InternVL3.5-2B, InternVL3.5-4B, InternVL3.5-14B and InternVL3.5-38B obtain scores of 78.8/89.1, 82.6/92.3, 85.1/93.3, and 87.8/95.1, respectively, indicating a consistent upward trend across larger models. On ChartQA, InternVL3.5-4B shows a notable improvement in chart understanding, increasing from 80.7 (InternVL3.5-2B) to 86.0, reflecting a significant gain in visual reasoning capability. Similarly, on CharXiv and VCR-EN-Easy, larger model variants also achieve measurable improvements in text and document understanding.
items.zh: 此外，随着模型规模的增加，InternVL3.5在视觉-语言理解方面持续提供增强的性能。在相同的九个基准测试上，InternVL3.5-4B、InternVL3.5-20B-A4B、InternVL3.5-14B、InternVL3.5-30B-A3B和InternVL3.5-38B的总体平均分分别为80.0、81.7、82.0、83.9和84.6，展示了随着模型规模增大的一致改进。在AI2D上，InternVL3.5-2B、InternVL3.5-4B、InternVL3.5-14B和InternVL3.5-38B分别获得78.8/89.1、82.6/92.3、85.1/93.3和87.8/95.1，表明在更大模型上呈现一致上升趋势。在ChartQA上，InternVL3.5-4B在图表理解方面显示出显著改进，从80.7（InternVL3.5-2B）增加到86.0，反映了视觉推理能力的显著提升。类似地，在CharXiv和VCR-EN-Easy上，更大的模型变体也在文本和文档理解方面取得了可衡量的改进。

items.en: To assess InternVL3’s ability to understand and reason over multiple images —– a key aspect of multimodal interaction —– we conduct comprehensive evaluations on a suite of widely recognized benchmarks, including BLINK [36], Mantis-Eval [51], MMIU [91], MuirBench [132], MMT-Bench [166], and MIRB [181]. These benchmarks evaluate critical skills such as cross-image reasoning and context integration, which are essential for effective multimodal systems.
items.zh: 为了评估InternVL3理解多张图像并进行推理的能力——这是多模态交互的一个关键方面——我们在多个广泛认可的基准测试上进行了全面评估，包括BLINK [36]、Mantis-Eval [51]、MMIU [91]、MuirBench [132]、MMT-Bench [166]和MIRB [181]。这些基准测试评估了跨图像推理和上下文整合等关键技能，这对于有效的多模态系统至关重要。

items.en: As shown in Table 5, across various model scales, InternVL3.5 consistently outperforms other open-source and closed-source counterparts, including earlier versions such as InternVL3. For example, InternVL3.5-38B achieves an overall score of 67.4, which is higher than the 66.2 achieved by InternVL3-38B. On the lightweight scale, InternVL3.5-2B achieves an overall score of 50.5, and its performance on individual benchmarks is 51.3 on BLINK, 58.5 on Mantis, 44.9 on MMIU, 44.0 on Muir, 58.5 on MMT and 45.9 on MIRB. Furthermore, larger model sizes lead to significant improvements in multi-image understanding capabilities. When the model is scaled up to InternVL3.5-4B, the overall score increases to 57.2, with scores of 58.1 on BLINK, 62.7 on Mantis, 49.2 on MMIU, 53.1 on Muir, 64.3 on MMT, and 55.9 on MIRB. As the model size continues to grow, performance across all benchmarks improves consistently, with InternVL3.5-8B achieving an overall score of 59.9, InternVL3.5-14B reaching 61.3, and InternVL3.5-241B-A28B improving to 65.5.
items.zh: 如表5所示，在各种模型规模上，InternVL3.5持续优于其他开源和闭源对应模型，包括早期版本如InternVL3。例如，InternVL3.5-38B总体得分67.4，高于InternVL3-38B的66.2。在轻量级规模上，InternVL3.5-2B总体得分50.5，在单个基准上的表现为：BLINK 51.3、Mantis 58.5、MMIU 44.9、Muir 44.0、MMT 58.5和MIRB 45.9。此外，更大的模型规模带来了多图像理解能力的显著提升。当模型扩展到InternVL3.5-4B时，总体得分增加到57.2，其中BLINK 58.1、Mantis 62.7、MMIU 49.2、Muir 53.1、MMT 64.3和MIRB 55.9。随着模型规模继续增长，所有基准的性能一致提升，InternVL3.5-8B总体得分59.9，InternVL3.5-14B达到61.3，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B提升至65.5。

items.en: To evaluate the performance of InternVL3.5 on realistic and complex tasks, we provide experimental results on four real-world comprehension benchmarks: RealWorldQA [22], MME-RealWorld [178], WildVision [78], and R-Bench [60].
items.zh: 为了评估InternVL3.5在真实复杂任务上的性能，我们提供了四个真实世界理解基准的实验结果：RealWorldQA [22]、MME-RealWorld [178]、WildVision [78]和R-Bench [60]。

items.en: As shown in Table 5, InternVL3.5 achieves comparable or superior performance compared to existing methods, e.g., Qwen2.5-VL, MiniCPM-V-4 and Keye-VL. For example, the smallest variant InternVL3.5-1B demonstrates promising performance with a RealWorldQA score of 57.6, an MME-RealWorld score of 46.8, a WildVision win rate of 49.2, and an R-Bench score of 57.4. Scaling up the model results in further improvements, as larger models provide more robust representations and stronger comprehension capabilities in real-world scenarios.
items.zh: 如表5所示，InternVL3.5与现有方法（如Qwen2.5-VL、MiniCPM-V-4和Keye-VL）相比，取得了相当或更优的性能。例如，最小的变体InternVL3.5-1B在RealWorldQA上得分为57.6，MME-RealWorld得分为46.8，WildVision胜率为49.2，R-Bench得分为57.4，展现了有前景的性能。扩大模型规模会带来进一步改进，因为更大的模型在现实场景中提供了更鲁棒的表示和更强的理解能力。

items.en: At the higher end of the scale, the InternVL3.5-38B and InternVL3.5-241B-A28B models achieve top-tier results among the InternVL3.5 series. In particular, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B records an overall score of 74.6. Compared to competitive models, such as GPT-4o [95]—which scores 45.2 on MME-RealWorld and 80.6 on WildVision—the InternVL3.5 series exhibits competitive strengths. InternVL3.5-241B-A28B not only surpasses GPT-4o on RealWorldQA and closely matches its R-Bench performance but also considerably outperforms it on MME-RealWorld, indicating a robust overall performance on tasks demanding both perceptual precision and comprehensive understanding.
items.zh: 在高端规模上，InternVL3.5-38B和InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在InternVL3.5系列中取得了顶尖结果。特别是，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B的总得分为74.6。与竞争模型（如GPT-4o [95]，其在MME-RealWorld上得分为45.2，在WildVision上得分为80.6）相比，InternVL3.5系列展现了竞争性优势。InternVL3.5-241B-A28B不仅在RealWorldQA上超越GPT-4o，并在R-Bench上与其表现接近，而且在MME-RealWorld上大幅领先，表明其在需要感知精度和全面理解的任务上具有稳健的整体性能。

items.en: In Table 6, we evaluate InternVL3.5 on a set of comprehensive multimodal understanding benchmarks, including MME [34], MMBench (English and Chinese) [71], MMBench v1.1 (English) [71], and MMVet [168] and MMStar [11].
items.zh: 在表6中，我们在包括MME [34]、MMBench（英文和中文）[71]、MMBench v1.1（英文）[71]、MMVet [168]和MMStar [11]在内的一组全面多模态理解基准上评估了InternVL3.5。

items.en: We observe that InternVL3.5 outperforms existing methods like Keye-VL, Qwen2.5-VL and MiniCPM-V-4, especially on MMStar and MMVet. For instance, InternVL3.5-4B achieves an MMVet score of 76.6 and MMStar of 65.0, compared to 56.6 and 59.0 of MiniCPM-V-4. The improvements remain significant as model size grows, where InternVL3.5-241B-A28B finally achieves 87.4 on MMBench v1.1, 81.2 on MMVet, 77.9 on MMStar, and an overall score of 84.2.
items.zh: 我们观察到InternVL3.5优于现有方法如Keye-VL、Qwen2.5-VL和MiniCPM-V-4，尤其是在MMStar和MMVet上。例如，InternVL3.5-4B在MMVet上得分为76.6，在MMStar上得分为65.0，而MiniCPM-V-4分别为56.6和59.0。随着模型规模增大，改进仍然显著，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B最终在MMBench v1.1上达到87.4，MMVet上81.2，MMStar上77.9，总得分为84.2。

items.en: We note that InternVL3.5 does not achieve a notable improvement compared to InternVL3. This is partly because the model’s understanding performance has approached saturation, and also partly stems from our optimization of text and reasoning capabilities—which, while achieving improvements on relevant benchmarks, slightly impairs the performance of multimodal understanding.
items.zh: 我们注意到，与InternVL3相比，InternVL3.5并未取得显著改进。部分原因是模型的理解性能已接近饱和，另一部分原因是我们对文本和推理能力的优化——虽然在这些相关基准上取得了改进，但略微损害了多模态理解的性能。

items.en: To evaluate the propensity for hallucination of InternVL3.5, we conduct experiments on three established benchmarks: HallusionBench [41], CRPE [144], and POPE [64]. The results are shown in Table 6. Compared with previous InternVL series, the new InternVL3.5 models provide consistent improvements in handling multimodal hallucination challenges across various model scales, e.g., +2.6 on 2B scale and +1.0 on 38B scale on the overall score. Despite these advancements, there are minor declines on some model scales such as 14B and 241B-A28B, indicating that further enhancement on data and training strategies is needed to achieve more consistent improvements on all model scales, which remains an important future direction to build a more trustworthy multimodal model.
items.zh: 为了评估InternVL3.5的幻觉倾向，我们在三个既定基准上进行了实验：HallusionBench [41]、CRPE [144]和POPE [64]。结果如表6所示。与之前的InternVL系列相比，新的InternVL3.5模型在不同模型规模上处理多模态幻觉挑战时提供了持续的改进，例如在2B规模上总得分提升+2.6，在38B规模上提升+1.0。尽管取得了这些进展，但在某些模型规模（如14B和241B-A28B）上出现了小幅下降，表明需要在数据和训练策略上进一步改进，以在所有模型规模上实现更一致的提升，这仍然是构建更可信多模态模型的重要未来方向。

items.en: For the visual grounding task, we evaluate InternVL3.5 on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg datasets [54, 86]. As shown in Table 7, InternVL3.5 maintains the strong capabilities of InternVL3, which already achieves the upper bound of this tasks, i.e., approximately 90% average accuracy. However, the InternVL3.5 training scheme still provides additional gains on several model sizes. For example, InternVL3.5-14B achieves an overall score of 90.1 on the RefCOCO series, outperforming InternVL3-14B by +0.8%. In addition, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B builds a new state-of-the-art performance on RefCOCO, with an overall score of 92.4, further highlighting the potential of InternVL3.5 for real-world applications requiring precise multimodal understanding.
items.zh: 对于视觉定位任务，我们在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+和RefCOCOg数据集 [54, 86]上评估了InternVL3.5。如表7所示，InternVL3.5保持了InternVL3的强大能力，后者已经达到了该任务的上限，即约90%的平均准确率。然而，InternVL3.5的训练方案在多个模型规模上仍然提供了额外增益。例如，InternVL3.5-14B在RefCOCO系列上取得了90.1的总得分，比InternVL3-14B高出+0.8%。此外，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在RefCOCO上建立了新的最先进性能，总得分为92.4，进一步凸显了InternVL3.5在需要精确多模态理解的现实应用中的潜力。

items.en: InternVL3.5 exhibits strong multimodal multilingual understanding across a variety of benchmarks and languages. As summarized in Table 8, InternVL3.5 consistently achieves high scores on MMMB [114], Multilingual MMBench [114] and MTVQA [119], covering six languages including English, Chinese, Portuguese, Arabic, Turkish, and Russian. Compared to InternVL3, InternVL3.5 has significant improvements in its language capabilities, thus achieving better results on these multilingual benchmarks. For example, InternVL3.5-1B achieves up to 1.2% gains over InternVL3-1B. Compared to other leading multimodal models, such as Qwen2.5-VL and GPT-4V, InternVL3.5 also demonstrates notable improvements in both overall accuracy and language coverage, especially at larger scales. For example, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B outperforms GPT-4V by +14.7% on the overall score across all multilingual benchmarks. The results highlight InternVL3.5’s robust capability to handle complex multilingual and multimodal tasks, making it highly effective for global applications that require comprehensive cross-language understanding.
items.zh: InternVL3.5在多种基准和语言上展现了强大的多模态多语言理解能力。如表8总结，InternVL3.5在MMMB [114]、多语言MMBench [114]和MTVQA [119]上持续取得高分，涵盖英语、中文、葡萄牙语、阿拉伯语、土耳其语和俄语六种语言。与InternVL3相比，InternVL3.5在语言能力上有显著提升，从而在这些多语言基准上取得了更好的结果。例如，InternVL3.5-1B比InternVL3-1B提升了高达1.2%。与其他领先的多模态模型（如Qwen2.5-VL和GPT-4V）相比，InternVL3.5在整体准确率和语言覆盖面上也展现了显著改进，尤其是在更大规模上。例如，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在所有多语言基准的总得分上比GPT-4V高出+14.7%。这些结果凸显了InternVL3.5处理复杂多语言和多模态任务的强大能力，使其对于需要全面跨语言理解的全球应用非常有效。

items.en: InternVL3.5 demonstrates remarkable video understanding capabilities across a comprehensive set of benchmarks. As presented in Table 9, InternVL3.5 consistently achieves competitive or leading scores on Video-MME [35], MVBench [63], MMBench-Video [33], MLVU [186], LongVideoBench [149]. Performance improvements are observed across almost all metrics for small-size models. In particular, InternVL3.5-1B outperforms InternVL3-1B by +2.2% of overall performance. For larger InternVL3.5 variants (such as 38B) also deliver comparable results with other state-of-the-art models of similar scale. Furthermore, InternVL3.5 exhibits robust generalization on challenging tasks involving long video sequences and complex reasoning, as reflected in its performance on LongVideoBench. In particular, InternVL3.5-1B achieves significant improvements on LongVideoBench, i.e., +4.9%. The model’s ability to process multi-frame inputs and handle diverse video scenarios underscores its versatility. These results highlight InternVL3.5’s substantial progress in video understanding, positioning it as a highly capable solution for advanced multimodal video analysis tasks.
items.zh: InternVL3.5在一系列全面的基准上展现了卓越的视频理解能力。如表9所示，InternVL3.5在Video-MME [35]、MVBench [63]、MMBench-Video [33]、MLVU [186]、LongVideoBench [149]上持续取得竞争性或领先的分数。对于小尺寸模型，几乎所有指标都观察到了性能提升。特别是，InternVL3.5-1B的整体性能比InternVL3-1B高出+2.2%。较大的InternVL3.5变体（如38B）也与其他类似规模的最先进模型取得了可比的结果。此外，InternVL3.5在涉及长视频序列和复杂推理的挑战性任务上展现了鲁棒的泛化能力，这反映在其在LongVideoBench上的表现。特别是，InternVL3.5-1B在LongVideoBench上取得了显著改进，即+4.9%。模型处理多帧输入和多样化视频场景的能力凸显了其多功能性。这些结果强调了InternVL3.5在视频理解方面的实质性进展，使其成为高级多模态视频分析任务的强大解决方案。

items.en: To validate the GUI agent capabilities of InternVL3.5, we conduct detailed experiments in Table 10. In particular, we evaluate InternVL3.5 on six GUI grounding and agent tasks, namely ScreenSpot [16], ScreenSpot-v2 [150], OSWorld-G [156], OSWorld [156], WindowsAgentArena [7], and WebArena-Lite-v2 [145]. In GUI grounding tasks, InternVL3.5 outperforms most open-source models and is close to the performance of closed-source models. For example, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B outperforms the specialized model, e.g., +2.6% against UI-TARS-72B [101] on ScreenSpot-v2. Compared to the most advanced commercial model, i.e., Seed1.5-VL [42], InternVL3.5-241B-A28B still maintains close performance on ScreenSpot-v2, i.e., 92.9 vs. 95.2. In GUI agent tasks, InternVL also demonstrates competitive results on different platforms. In particular, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B achieves the best results against existing generalist MLLMs, e.g., +8.3% over Qwen2.5-VL-72B on WindowsAgentArena. In particular, GPT-4o only achieves a score of 3.5 on this challenging benchmark. On WebArena-Lite-v2, the performance score of GPT-4o further decreases to 1.9, but InternVL3.5-241B-A28B can still achieve a top-tier score of 11.7. These results confirm the great potential of InternVL3.5 as a fundamental model for GUI tasks.
items.zh: 为了验证InternVL3.5的GUI智能体能力，我们在表10中进行了详细实验。具体来说，我们在六个GUI定位和智能体任务上评估了InternVL3.5，即ScreenSpot [16]、ScreenSpot-v2 [150]、OSWorld-G [156]、OSWorld [156]、WindowsAgentArena [7]和WebArena-Lite-v2 [145]。在GUI定位任务中，InternVL3.5优于大多数开源模型，并接近闭源模型的性能。例如，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在ScreenSpot-v2上比专门模型UI-TARS-72B [101]高出+2.6%。与最先进的商业模型Seed1.5-VL [42]相比，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在ScreenSpot-v2上仍保持接近的性能，即92.9对95.2。在GUI智能体任务中，InternVL在不同平台上展现了竞争性结果。特别是，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在现有通用MLLM中取得了最佳结果，例如在WindowsAgentArena上比Qwen2.5-VL-72B高出+8.3%。值得注意的是，GPT-4o在这个具有挑战性的基准上仅得分为3.5。在WebArena-Lite-v2上，GPT-4o的性能得分进一步下降至1.9，但InternVL3.5-241B-A28B仍能取得11.7的顶级得分。这些结果证实了InternVL3.5作为GUI任务基础模型的巨大潜力。

items.en: In Table 11, we evaluate the embodied capabilities of InternVL3.5 on four benchmarks: VSI-Bench [161], ERQA [121], Space10 [38], and OmniSpatial [50]. From this table, we observe the strong embodied capabilities of InternVL3.5 against previous works. On VSI-Bench, the most popular benchmark for spatial reasoning, InternVL3.5-1B achieves an overall score of 49.3, outperforming its predecessor by +19.6%. We note that InternVL3.5-1B can already achieve the state-of-the-art performance on VSI-Bench against much larger models like Qwen2.5-VL-72B [5]. When the model size of InternVL3.5 increases, the performance on VSI-Bench consistently improves from 49.3 to 69.5, greatly validating the salability of InternVL3.5 on embodied tasks. In addition to VSI-Bench, InternVL3.5 also demonstrates promising results on ERQA, Space10 and OminiSpatial. Among them, InternVL3.5B-241B-A28B scores 46.8 on ERQA, which is close to the 48.3 score of the top closed-source model Gemini-2.5-Pro. In terms of overall performance, InternVL3.5B-241B-A28B also reaches the highest score against other models, confirming its strong capabilities in embodied tasks.
items.zh: 在表11中，我们在四个基准上评估了InternVL3.5的具身能力：VSI-Bench [161]、ERQA [121]、Space10 [38]和OmniSpatial [50]。从该表中，我们观察到InternVL3.5相对于先前工作具有强大的具身能力。在VSI-Bench（最流行的空间推理基准）上，InternVL3.5-1B取得了49.3的总得分，比其前身高出+19.6%。我们注意到，InternVL3.5-1B已经可以在VSI-Bench上达到最先进性能，超越像Qwen2.5-VL-72B [5]这样更大的模型。当InternVL3.5的模型规模增大时，VSI-Bench上的性能从49.3持续提升到69.5，极大地验证了InternVL3.5在具身任务上的可扩展性。除了VSI-Bench，InternVL3.5在ERQA、Space10和OmniSpatial上也展现了有前景的结果。其中，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在ERQA上得分为46.8，接近顶级闭源模型Gemini-2.5-Pro的48.3分。在整体性能方面，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B也达到了其他模型中的最高分，证实了其在具身任务中的强大能力。

items.en: Scalable vector graphics (SVG) is a common format for describing graphics on web pages, and its understanding is significant for web-based agent tasks. To evaluate this capability, We evaluate InternVL3.5 on SGP-Bench [102] (Table 12), where it delivers strong results across model scales and sets new open-source state-of-the-art at larger capacities. At the small scale, InternVL3.5-4B already surpasses models such as Kimi-VL-A3B [125] and even the earlier InternVL3-14B [187]. In the mid-size range (8B, 14B), InternVL3.5 shows broad improvements, and the 14B variant surpasses larger counterparts such as Gemma-3-27B [122]. At the high end, InternVL3.5-30B-A3B and InternVL3.5-38B achieve nearly 70% accuracy on SGP-Bench, advancing the state-of-the-art among open models and outperforming competitors such as Step3-321B-A38B [129], Qwen2.5-VL-72B [5] and GLM-4.5V [46]. Finally, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B sets a new record for open-source models, achieving the best performance across all categories except when compared to GPT-5 [98].
items.zh: 可缩放矢量图形（SVG）是描述网页图形的常见格式，其理解对于基于网页的智能体任务至关重要。为了评估这一能力，我们在SGP-Bench [102]（表12）上评估了InternVL3.5，它在不同模型规模上取得了强劲结果，并在更大容量下设立了新的开源最先进水平。在小规模上，InternVL3.5-4B已经超越了Kimi-VL-A3B [125]甚至更早的InternVL3-14B [187]等模型。在中规模范围（8B、14B）内，InternVL3.5展现了广泛的改进，14B变体超越了更大的对应模型如Gemma-3-27B [122]。在高端，InternVL3.5-30B-A3B和InternVL3.5-38B在SGP-Bench上达到了近70%的准确率，推进了开放模型的最先进水平，并优于Step3-321B-A38B [129]、Qwen2.5-VL-72B [5]和GLM-4.5V [46]等竞争对手。最后，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B为开源模型设立了新纪录，在所有类别中取得了最佳性能，除了与GPT-5 [98]比较时。

items.en: In the SArena-Icon generation tasks (Text2SVG and Img2SVG), InternVL3.5 establishes new state-of-the-art performance among open models (Table 13). In Text2SVG, our models achieve markedly lower FID and FID-C scores than previous baselines, with the 38B variant reducing FID to 14.56. This performance even surpasses GPT-4o [97] (15.18), highlighting that InternVL3.5 is able to match or exceed the capabilities of much larger proprietary systems. In Img2SVG, the 30B and 38B variants deliver leading results on structural similarity metrics, outperforming open-source peers of comparable scale and closely matching the best proprietary systems. Furthermore, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B achieves an even stronger balance of fidelity and perceptual quality, with an FID of 11.27 and an FID-C of 4.43 in Text2SVG, together with competitive Img2SVG scores. These results highlight both the efficiency and scalability of InternVL3.5, showing that it consistently outperforms prior open models across all metrics, narrows the gap with proprietary leaders, and establishes itself as the most powerful open-source framework for SVG generation to date.
items.zh: 在SArena-Icon生成任务（Text2SVG和Img2SVG）中，InternVL3.5在开放模型中建立了新的最先进性能（表13）。在Text2SVG中，我们的模型取得了比先前基线明显更低的FID和FID-C分数，38B变体将FID降低到14.56。这一性能甚至超越了GPT-4o [97]（15.18），凸显了InternVL3.5能够匹配或超越更大专有系统的能力。在Img2SVG中，30B和38B变体在结构相似性指标上取得了领先结果，优于类似规模的开源同行，并紧密匹配最佳专有系统。此外，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在保真度和感知质量上实现了更强的平衡，在Text2SVG中FID为11.27，FID-C为4.43，同时具有竞争性的Img2SVG分数。这些结果凸显了InternVL3.5的效率和可扩展性，表明它在所有指标上持续优于先前的开放模型，缩小了与专有领导者的差距，并确立了自身作为迄今为止最强大的SVG生成开源框架的地位。

items.en: To evaluate the language capabilities of InternVL3.5, we use benchmarks covering comprehensive assessments in general knowledge (MMLU [44], CMMLU [61], C-Eval [49], GAOKAO-Bench [177]), linguistic understanding (TriviaQA [52], NaturalQuestions [56], C3 [115], RACE [57]), reasoning (WinoGrande [107], HellaSwag [172], BigBench Hard [117]), mathematics (GSM8K-Test [18], MATH [45], AIME24 [84], AIME25 [85]), and coding (HumanEval [12]) tasks. As shown in Table 14, InternVL3.5 achieves even better performance than its corresponding language models on most benchmarks. Specifically, InternVL3.5-1B outperforms Qwen3-0.6B on 15 of 16 text-related benchmarks, with an overall performance gain of +6.7. For larger models such as InternVL3.5-241B-A28B, the performance improvement is also obvious, i.e., +2.3 over Qwen3-235B-A22B. These improvements come not only from the high-quality text corpora we use during pre-training and SFT, but also from our Cascade RL, which significantly benefits text-based reasoning tasks. The improvement of InternVL3.5 in text capabilities has also greatly compensated for the shortcomings of open-source multimodal models in general capabilities.
items.zh: 为了评估InternVL3.5的语言能力，我们使用了涵盖通用知识（MMLU [44]、CMMLU [61]、C-Eval [49]、GAOKAO-Bench [177]）、语言理解（TriviaQA [52]、NaturalQuestions [56]、C3 [115]、RACE [57]）、推理（WinoGrande [107]、HellaSwag [172]、BigBench Hard [117]）、数学（GSM8K-Test [18]、MATH [45]、AIME24 [84]、AIME25 [85]）和编程（HumanEval [12]）任务的全面评估基准。如表14所示，InternVL3.5在大多数基准上取得了比其对应语言模型更好的性能。具体来说，InternVL3.5-1B在16个文本相关基准中的15个上优于Qwen3-0.6B，整体性能提升+6.7。对于更大的模型如InternVL3.5-241B-A28B，性能改进也很明显，即比Qwen3-235B-A22B高出+2.3。这些改进不仅来自我们在预训练和SFT中使用的高质量文本语料库，还来自我们的级联强化学习（Cascade RL），它显著有益于基于文本的推理任务。InternVL3.5在文本能力上的改进也极大地弥补了开源多模态模型在通用能力上的不足。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Ablation on Cascade RL. We report average scores on the same set of multimodal reasoning and mathematical benchmarks as in Table 3. Full results are provided in Table 15.
items.capZh: 图5：级联强化学习的消融实验。我们报告了与表3相同的多模态推理和数学基准上的平均分数。完整结果见表15。

items.en: Cascade Reinforcement Learning (Cascade RL). To validate the effectiveness of Cascade RL, we conduct an ablation study in Figure 5 and Table 15. We evaluate a baseline model InternVL3 as well as InternVL3.5 after different training stages: InternVL3.5-Instruct (after SFT), InternVL3.5-MPO (after the first substage in Cascade RL), and InternVL3.5-CascadeRL (after both substages in Cascade RL). From it we can see that InternVL3.5-Instruct already outperforms InternVL3 by margins, e.g., + 9.3% on the 8B model. Even based on these strong SFT baselines, the performance of InternVL3.5 can be further improved after the MPO stage, providing up to +3.5% average gains on reasoning tasks. Compared to MPO-based models, our Cascade RL still provides orthogonal gains for all dense and MoE models. For example, InternVL3.5-2B obtains 12.2% average performance gains on reasoning tasks compared to the SFT model. Similar merits can also be observed on larger models, e.g., +6.5% on InternVL3.5-241B-A28B. These ablations confirm the effectiveness, stability, and scalability of our Cascade RL. Additionally, we present a comparison of the efficiency and effectiveness of our proposed Cascade RL against MPO and GSPO in Table 16. For MPO and Cascade RL, we report performance after training for one episode, whereas for GSPO, we report results after both one and two episodes. We observe that MPO achieves performance gains with only a small number of GPU hours, while GSPO yields more significant improvements but at the cost of substantially higher computational consumption. In contrast, Cascade RL attains even greater performance improvements while requiring only half the GPU hours of GSPO.
items.zh: 级联强化学习（Cascade RL）。为了验证Cascade RL的有效性，我们在图5和表15中进行了消融研究。我们评估了基线模型InternVL3以及不同训练阶段后的InternVL3.5：InternVL3.5-Instruct（SFT后）、InternVL3.5-MPO（Cascade RL第一子阶段后）和InternVL3.5-CascadeRL（Cascade RL两个子阶段后）。从中我们可以看到，InternVL3.5-Instruct已经以一定幅度优于InternVL3，例如在8B模型上提升+9.3%。即使基于这些强大的SFT基线，InternVL3.5的性能在MPO阶段后可以进一步提升，在推理任务上提供高达+3.5%的平均增益。与基于MPO的模型相比，我们的Cascade RL仍然为所有密集和MoE模型提供了正交增益。例如，与SFT模型相比，InternVL3.5-2B在推理任务上获得了12.2%的平均性能增益。在更大模型上也可以观察到类似的优点，例如InternVL3.5-241B-A28B提升+6.5%。这些消融实验证实了我们的Cascade RL的有效性、稳定性和可扩展性。此外，我们在表16中展示了我们提出的Cascade RL与MPO和GSPO在效率和效果上的比较。对于MPO和Cascade RL，我们报告训练一个周期后的性能，而对于GSPO，我们报告一个和两个周期后的结果。我们观察到MPO以少量GPU小时实现了性能增益，而GSPO产生了更显著的改进，但代价是计算消耗大幅增加。相比之下，Cascade RL在仅需GSPO一半GPU小时的情况下获得了更大的性能改进。

items.en: Visual Resolution Router (ViR). In Tables 17 and 18, we compare efficiency and performance of InternVL3.5 with and without ViR, and models equipped with ViR are called InternVL3.5-Flash. In Table 18 , we validate the efficiency improvement brought by ViR. From it we can see that the proposed DvD can already accelerate inference by up to 2.01×\times, based on which ViR still provides significant efficiency gains, e.g., 4.05×\times speedup. Note that the efficiency gains of ViR are also obvious for the large MoE model, i.e., InternVL3.5-241B-A28B, which is significant for real-world application.
items.zh: 视觉分辨率路由器（ViR）。在表17和表18中，我们比较了有和没有ViR的InternVL3.5的效率和性能，配备ViR的模型称为InternVL3.5-Flash。在表18中，我们验证了ViR带来的效率提升。从中可以看出，提出的DvD已经可以将推理加速高达2.01倍，在此基础上ViR仍然提供了显著的效率增益，例如4.05倍的加速。注意，ViR的效率增益对于大型MoE模型（即InternVL3.5-241B-A28B）也很明显，这对实际应用意义重大。

items.en: In Table 17, we compare the performance of InternVL3.5 and InternVL3.5-Flash on several significant benchmarks. For these results, we can see that InternVL3.5-Flash can maintain the multimodal understanding and reasoning performance. In high-resolution tasks like DocVQA and InfoVQA, InternVL3.5-Flash can reach almost the 100% performance of InternVL3.5, e.g., 80.2 vs. 79.8 on 8B model size. Even when the model size improves to 241B, similar observations still hold. These results further confirm that ViR can greatly benefit the model performance without sacrificing performance.
items.zh: 在表17中，我们比较了InternVL3.5和InternVL3.5-Flash在几个重要基准上的性能。从这些结果中，我们可以看到InternVL3.5-Flash能够保持多模态理解和推理性能。在像DocVQA和InfoVQA这样的高分辨率任务中，InternVL3.5-Flash几乎可以达到InternVL3.5的100%性能，例如在8B模型规模上为80.2对79.8。即使模型规模提升到241B，类似的观察仍然成立。这些结果进一步证实了ViR可以在不牺牲性能的情况下极大地有益于模型效率。

items.en: Decoupled Vision-Language Deployment (DvD). In Table 18, we conduct detailed ablation on InternVL3.5 to show the benefit of DvD. From this table, the first observation is that DvD greatly accelerates the inference of both dense and MoE models, by up to 2.01 times and 1.97 times for InternVL3.5-241B-A28B and InternVL3.5-38B, respectively. In addition, the efficiency gains of DvD can benefit both the pre-filling and next-token prediction stages of InternVL3.5. Another finding is that as the input resolution increases, DVD efficiency also improves. For example, on InternVL3.5-38B, the speed-up of DvD can be improved from 1.19 to 1.97 as the resolution increases from 448 to 1344. This phenomenon can be attributed to the fact that larger input resolution or visual backbone leads to higher visual computational costs and further blocks the computation of the LLM. It is worth noting that the increased computational cost of high-resolution images arises because mainstream MLLMs typically adopt a dynamic high-resolution strategy, which increases the number of patches fed into the vision encoder and thereby raises the overall computation. In practical applications, beyond high-resolution images, many tasks also require multi-image and video understanding. In such scenarios, the number of patches processed by the vision encoder grows even further, leading to greater visual overhead. We believe that our proposed DvD can deliver even more significant performance gains in these scenarios.
items.zh: 解耦视觉语言部署（DvD）。在表18中，我们对InternVL3.5进行了详细消融，以展示DvD的好处。从该表中，第一个观察是DvD极大地加速了密集和MoE模型的推理，对于InternVL3.5-241B-A28B和InternVL3.5-38B分别高达2.01倍和1.97倍。此外，DvD的效率增益可以同时有益于InternVL3.5的预填充和下一个词预测阶段。另一个发现是，随着输入分辨率的增加，DvD的效率也提高。例如，在InternVL3.5-38B上，随着分辨率从448增加到1344，DvD的加速从1.19提升到1.97。这一现象可以归因于更大的输入分辨率或视觉主干导致更高的视觉计算成本，并进一步阻塞了LLM的计算。值得注意的是，高分辨率图像的计算成本增加是因为主流MLLM通常采用动态高分辨率策略，这增加了输入到视觉编码器的块数，从而提高了整体计算量。在实际应用中，除了高分辨率图像，许多任务还需要多图像和视频理解。在这些场景中，视觉编码器处理的块数进一步增加，导致更大的视觉开销。我们相信，我们提出的DvD在这些场景中可以提供更显著的性能增益。

items.en: In this work, we introduce InternVL3.5, the latest family of InternVL models that demonstrates stronger general performance and faster speed across a wide range of tasks. InternVL3.5 adopts a new reinforcement learning (RL) framework, namely Cascade RL, which combines the benefits of offline and online RL methods to boost reasoning capabilities. In addition, two techniques are further introduced to reduce the inference cost of InternVL3.5, namely Visual Resolution Router (ViR) and Decoupled Vision-Language Deployment (DvD). Benefiting from these innovations, InternVL3.5 achieves +16.0% improvement in overall reasoning performance and 4.05×\times speed-up in inference efficiency compared to InternVL3. Besides, InternVL3.5 has significant improvements in its versatility against InternVL3. Specifically, InternVL3.5-241B-A28B achieves the highest overall score across multimodal general, reasoning, text, and agency tasks among leading open-source MLLMs, significantly narrowing the performance gap with top-tier commercial models like GPT-5. We believe that our open source models and codes will push forward multimodal AI research and its real-world applications.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们介绍了InternVL3.5，这是InternVL模型的最新系列，在广泛的任务中展现了更强的通用性能和更快的速度。InternVL3.5采用了一种新的强化学习（RL）框架，即级联强化学习（Cascade RL），它结合了离线和在线RL方法的优点来提升推理能力。此外，还引入了两种技术来降低InternVL3.5的推理成本，即视觉分辨率路由器（ViR）和解耦视觉语言部署（DvD）。得益于这些创新，与InternVL3相比，InternVL3.5在整体推理性能上实现了+16.0%的提升，推理效率实现了4.05倍的加速。此外，与InternVL3相比，InternVL3.5在多用途性上也有显著改进。具体来说，InternVL3.5-241B-A28B在领先的开源MLLM中，在多模态通用、推理、文本和智能体任务上取得了最高总分，显著缩小了与顶级商业模型（如GPT-5）的性能差距。我们相信，我们的开源模型和代码将推动多模态AI研究及其实际应用。
